entries.title: Contextual Retrieval in AI Systems
entries.description: Explore how Anthropic enhances AI systems through advanced contextual retrieval methods. Learn about our approach to improving information access and relevance in large language models.

entries.title: Building Effective AI Agents
entries.description: Discover how Anthropic approaches the development of reliable AI agents. Learn about our research on agent capabilities, safety considerations, and technical framework for building trustworthy AI.

entries.title: Claude SWE-Bench Performance
entries.description: Explore Claude's breakthrough performance on SWE-Bench, demonstrating advanced software engineering capabilities and code generation accuracy. Learn about our technical evaluation methods.

entries.description: Learn how Claude Code's new sandboxing feature protects developers with filesystem and network isolation, reducing permission prompts and increasing user safety.

entries.description: Learn how code execution with the Model Context Protocol enables agents to handle more tools while using fewer tokens, reducing context overhead by up to 98.7%.

entries.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
entries.description: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

entries.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
entries.description: Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital.

entries.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
entries.description: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries

entries.title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
entries.description: As AI transforms the nature of and methods behind cyberattacks, how well do the techniques and frameworks used by the security community hold up? In a new report, we seek to answer that question.

entries.title: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
entries.description: In March, we launched the Claude Partner Network, a program for the firms that help enterprises put Claude into production.. Today, we’re announcing two new components that make this ecosystem easier for customers to navigate.
